overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player walks along wet streets reflecting colorful advertisements, crosses an intersection with passing vehicles including a police car, and passes by the 'Muren' metro station in a dense urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath overhead structures, passing glowing billboards on the left

entered.detail: giant illuminated screen displaying a face advertisement with green and orange neon colors
metal beam framework connecting buildings above the street creating a covered corridor
tall residential building with balconies and lit windows
green metal railings lining the edge of the sidewalk
tall vertical neon light strips in various colors attached to building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered cyberpunk city sidewalk at night. Neon billboards illuminate the left side while a tall concrete building stands on the right. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights, and overhead metal structures create a semi-enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with traffic control

events.description: exits covered walkway and enters open intersection with visible sky
pedestrian crosses the path from right to left in front of camera
black sports car drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the yellow crosswalk and walking across the intersection while observing surrounding traffic

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving through the intersection from right to left
person walking across the crosswalk in front of the camera heading left

entered.detail: yellow painted zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt
tall pole with traffic lights and pedestrian signals
large pink and purple circular neon sign on building facade
multi-story curved apartment building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection as the camera leaves the covered walkway. The ego crosses yellow zebra stripes while a pedestrian and black sports car pass by. A circular neon sign glows on the right building, and traffic signals control the flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro station entrance area with active traffic

events.description: white van and red sedan drive through the intersection
police car with emergency lights speeds past from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing across the intersection toward the Muren station sign, navigating around passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: police car with flashing lights speeding through the intersection
white van driving across the crosswalk area

entered.detail: red illuminated sign with 'Muren' text indicating metro station entrance
yellow and black striped metal barriers near the curb
tall building with 'WNS' corporate signage visible on upper floors

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ego completing the intersection crossing near the Muren metro station. Multiple vehicles including a police car pass through the intersection. The red Muren sign becomes prominent on the left, while construction barricades line the right side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered, neon-lit corridor into the wide, bustling expanse of a futuristic city intersection. It begins along a covered sidewalk where colorful billboards reflect off wet pavement beneath overhead metal structures and a towering concrete wall. As the camera leaves the enclosure, the scene opens into a broad urban crossing, moving across yellow zebra stripes past a black sports car and a glowing circular neon sign. The movement then continues across the intersection as traffic flows by, including a passing police car, while the environment shifts toward the Muren metro station. Finally, the perspective settles near the prominent red Muren signage on the left and construction barricades lining the right side of the street.
